description: EvoHarness RPC Balance History Router - 自动进化策略以最小化延迟

periodicChunking.description: Periodic wallet 的时间分片数量。较小值 (4-8) 更快但精度低，较大值 (16-24) 精确但 RPC 调用多

megaRecursionDepth.description: Mega wallet 的递归分层深度。更深 = 更精细的分片 = 更多 RPC 调用但可能更快的总体

megaHierarchical.description: Mega wallet 是否使用分层递归策略。false = 简单均匀分片；true = 先粗后细递归

bandLogic.description: Band 分片逻辑选择。dynamic = 根据 tx 量自适应选择块数；fixed = 总是 8 块；adaptive = 学习历史数据选最优

cacheStrategy.description: 缓存策略。none = 无缓存；l0 = pagination token 缓存；l0-l1 = 加入计算结果缓存

maxConcurrent.description: RPC 并发调用数上限。更高更快但可能触发 rate limit；推荐 Helius 免费层 <= 10，付费层 <= 32

quick_eval.description: 快速评估：只测试 3 个钱包，预算轻（用于快速迭代）

standard_eval.description: 标准评估：完整钱包覆盖

comprehensive_eval.description: 综合评估：所有钱包类型，包含边界情况

constraints: rate_limit_compliance: max 100 RPC calls per test
regression: new config must not be >20% worse than baseline

proposer_hints.latency_minimizer: Focus on reducing RPC round-trips. Consider: maxConcurrent, bandLogic=fixed, cacheStrategy=l0-l1
proposer_hints.cost_minimizer: Focus on API quota. Consider: periodicChunking += 2, megaRecursionDepth -= 1, maxConcurrent = 4
proposer_hints.hierarchical_searcher: Test megaHierarchical + deeper recursion for mega wallets. Risk: may need more API calls.
proposer_hints.band_optimizer: Experiment with bandLogic adaptive mode. Requires: baseline data in GBrain (search history of results)
proposer_hints.cache_optimizer: Test l0-l1 strategy on repeated wallet queries. Build cache invalidation logic.
proposer_hints.parallelizer: Push maxConcurrent up gradually. Start at 10, test 16, 24, 32. Monitor for rate limits.
